word: H67 - אָבֵל מִצְרַיִם - ʼÂbêl Mitsrayim - aw-bale' mits-rah'-yim - Abel-mizraim

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבל מצרים

Transliteration: 'âbêl mitsrayim

Phonetic: aw-bale' mits-rah'-yim

BDB Definition:

Abel Mizraim = "meadow of Egypt"
  1. a place east of the Jordan (perhaps " as fertile as Egypt" )

Origin: from H58 and H4714

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H63, H64, H65, H66
